# name

**Instance Property**

A localized human-readable name for the parameter, suitable for displaying in application UI.

## Declaration

```swift
var name: String { get }
```

## Inspecting a processing parameter

- **enabled**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the extension enables the parameter.
- **key**: A unique key string identifying the parameter.
- **longDescription**: A localized description of the parameter, suitable for displaying in a tool tip or similar explanatory UI.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the extension enables the parameter.
items.name: enabled

items.name: key
